summary: Validated Vermillion (Portuguese social network) bug fix + Portuguese-themed features across backend (50/50 pytest passing) and frontend (14/14 routes rendering correct PT-PT content). Critical bug fix CONFIRMED: anonymous boot on /api/auth/me now returns 200 {user: null} instead of 401. Login + redirect flow works. All mood chips, tabs, trending ranges, communities/events categories, settings tabs visible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2752 lines — should be split into modules (auth, posts, users, communities, events, trending) for maintainability
/api/explore/by-mood returns 400 when mood='' — confirm if intentional. Currently treated as expected behaviour by tests.
Endpoints accept Optional[viewer] via maybe_user (good) — consistent pattern across the codebase.
All interactive elements expose data-testid (login-form, login-email, login-submit, etc.) — excellent testability.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_vermillion.py (updated test_me_anonymous_returns_user_null & test_logout_clears_cookie to match new 200 {user: null} contract)
/app/backend/tests/test_portuguese_features.py (new file: 17 tests covering auth/me bug fix, trending ranges, explore-by-mood, badges)

success_rate.backend: 100% (50/50 pytest tests passing across test_vermillion.py + test_portuguese_features.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (14/14 routes load with Portuguese content; login + redirect works; no console errors; no 401s)

test_credentials: admin@vermillion.app / admin123 (verified working). Demo accounts in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: None created beyond ephemeral test users (test_a_* / test_b_*) which are cleaned up by module-level fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix is solid: /api/auth/me with no cookie returns 200 {user: null}; with cookie returns 200 {user: {...}}. Frontend (AuthContext) reads data.user correctly — no auth loops. UI validated for all 14 routes with PT-PT theme: moods (Saudade/Tasca/Festa/Café/Praia/Fado/Bola/Cultura), trending ranges (1h/24h/7d/30d) with velocity, 5 Explore tabs incl. Cidades 🇵🇹, Communities/Events PT categories, Settings 4 tabs (Conta/Notificações/Privacidade/Aparência), Profile badges (NÍVEL/REP/ONLINE/🔥streak). Messages filter labels in UI are Tudo/Não lidas/Fixadas/Arquivadas (= all/unread/pinned/archived). Bookmarks shows collections. Drafts/Scheduled load empty states properly.
rca_of_the_issue: Original auth-loop issue (401 on /api/auth/me during anonymous boot) was fixed in /app/backend/server.py line 649-654: handler now uses `await maybe_user(request)` and returns {user: None} on no/invalid cookie instead of raising 401. Frontend AuthContext now consumes `data.user`. Verified end-to-end: 0 console errors, network log shows 200 GET /api/auth/me on /login page.
